heading: Evaluations
label: 7981 Evaluations
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to .section 7941 of this title

Amendments2015—, amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section consisted of subsecs. (a) to (c) relating to reservation of funds for evaluations, exclusion of subchapters I and III, and evaluation activities authorized elsewhere, respectively.Pub. L. 114–95, § 8042

Effective Date of 2015 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 114–95section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95section 6301 of this titleDec. 10, 2015

children.label: i
children.text: are consistent with the evaluation plan under subsection (d); and

children.label: ii
children.text: primarily include impact evaluations that use experimental or quasi-experimental designs, where practicable and appropriate, and other rigorous methodologies that permit the strongest possible causal inferences;

children.label: B
children.text: conduct studies of the effectiveness of the programs and the administrative impact of the programs on schools and local educational agencies; and

children.label: ii
children.text: in forms that are understandable, easily accessible, usable, and adaptable for use in the improvement of educational practice;

children.label: iii
children.text: through electronic transfer and other means, such as posting, as available, to the websites of State educational agencies, local educational agencies, the Institute of Education Sciences, or the Department, or in another relevant place; and

children.label: iv
children.text: in a manner that promotes the utilization of such findings; and

children.label: i
children.text: Federal programs assisted or authorized under this chapter; and

children.label: ii
children.text: related Federal early childhood education programs, preschool programs, elementary school programs, and secondary school programs, under any other Federal law;

children.label: B
children.text: to increase the usefulness of the evaluations conducted under this section by improving the quality, timeliness, efficiency, and use of information relating to performance to promote continuous improvement of programs assisted or authorized under this chapter; and

children.label: C
children.text: to assist recipients of grants under such programs in collecting and analyzing data and other activities related to conducting high-quality evaluations under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Subchapter I
children.label: b Subchapter I
children.text: The Secretary, acting through the Director of the Institute of Education Sciences, shall use funds authorized under to carry out evaluation activities under this section related to subchapter I, and shall not reserve any other money from such subchapter for evaluation.section 6302(e) of this title
may consolidate the funds reserved under subsections (a) and (b) for purposes of carrying out the activities under subsection (a)(1); and
shall not be required to evaluate under subsection (a)(1) each program authorized under this chapter each year.
describes the specific activities that will be carried out under subsection (a) for the 2-year period applicable to the plan, and the timelines of such activities;
contains the results of the activities carried out under subsection (a) for the most recent 2-year period; and
describes how programs authorized under this chapter will be regularly evaluated.

children.heading: Evaluation activities authorized elsewhere
children.label: e Evaluation activities authorized elsewhere
children.text: If, under any other provision of this chapter, funds are authorized to be reserved or used for evaluation activities with respect to a program, the Secretary may not reserve additional funds under this section for the evaluation of that program.
